meta.title: Trigonion Tower – Thessaloniki, Greece
meta.description: Complete travel guide to Trigonion Tower in Thessaloniki, Greece. Learn about this historical monument, including location, views, access, and visitor information.

intro.title: Discover Trigonion Tower
intro.description: Trigonion Tower (Πύργος Τριγωνίου Αλύσεως) is a significant Byzantine fortification monument in Thessaloniki. Located in the Upper Town (Ano Poli) near Vlatadon Monastery, it was part of the city's fortifications. It offers panoramic views of the city and the Thermaic Gulf.

visitGuide.title: Visit Tips
items: The best time to visit is spring or autumn when the weather is pleasant.
Visit during the day for the best views.
Wear comfortable shoes as there are uphill paths.
Bring water and sun protection especially during summer.

sections.title: History & Construction
sections.content: Trigonion Tower was built during the Venetian period (around 15th century) as part of Thessaloniki's fortifications. Its name comes from the triangular shape of its base.

sections.title: Architecture
sections.content: The tower is a typical example of fortification architecture of the period. It is well preserved and accessible to visitors.

sections.title: Cultural Significance
sections.content: The tower is an important part of Thessaloniki's Byzantine and Venetian heritage. It is located near Vlatadon Monastery and the Upper Town.

sections.title: Protection & Conservation
sections.content: The tower is protected by the Ephorate of Antiquities of Thessaloniki City and is registered in the National Archaeological Cadastre.

hours.title: Visiting Hours
hours.bestTimeSummer: Summer: Cooler at morning and sunset, avoid midday heat
hours.bestTimeAutumn: Autumn: Mild weather, ideal for walking
hours.tip: No ticket required. It is recommended to visit during the day for the best views.

transport.title: How to Get Here
transport.fromCenterDesc: Distance of about 3km. You can reach by bus or private car.
transport.fromStationDesc: Buses from the center to the Upper Town.
transport.fromAirportDesc: Distance of about 18km. It is recommended to take a taxi or rental car.
transport.walkingDesc: Walk from the center to the Upper Town (30-40 minutes).
transport.drivingDesc: Parking available near the monument area.

route.title: Recommended Route
route.overview: Walk through the Upper Town and enjoy the view.
steps: Climb up to the Upper Town (Ano Poli)
Enjoy the panoramic view of the city
Visit Vlatadon Monastery and the walls

spots.title: Main Viewpoint
spots.description: The place where you can take the most classic photos of the tower and the city.

spots.title: Sea View Point
spots.description: Ideal location for photos of the city and the Thermaic Gulf.

spots.title: The Walls
spots.description: Impressive Byzantine architecture near the tower.

reviews.title: Visitor Reviews
reviews.declaration: Reviews can be viewed via Google Maps.
reviews.moreReviews: View more reviews on Google Maps

items.name: John C.
items.text: Incredible place! Offers panoramic views of Thessaloniki. Recommended to visit in spring.

items.name: Mary G.
items.text: Went with my family and it was excellent. Calm and historical place, perfect for family visit.

items.name: David P.
items.text: Very beautiful place for walking. The view is superb. Had a bit of difficulty finding parking on the weekend.

items.name: Helen S.
items.text: For Thessaloniki, this is one of the top historical attractions you should see.

items.name: Mark A.
items.text: Wonderful architecture and history. Quiet place away from the city noise.

items.name: Claire B.
items.text: Perfect place for photography. The view of the city is magical.

officialManagement.text: Trigonion Tower is managed and protected by the Ephorate of Antiquities of Thessaloniki City. The area is registered in the National Archaeological Cadastre.
